from myapp.auth import authenticate, authorize, hash_password, verify_token
from myapp.db import get_connection, execute_query, close_connection
from myapp.cache import get_cache, set_cache, invalidate_cache
from myapp.email import send_email, send_sms, format_template
from myapp.models import User, Order, Product, Invoice, Shipment
from myapp.utils import format_date, parse_csv, validate_json, slugify
from myapp.config import load_config, get_setting, reload_config
from myapp.logging import setup_logger, log_metric, log_event
from myapp.http import make_request, parse_response, retry_request

def process_user_signup(data: dict):
    user = User(**data)
    hash_password(user)
    conn = get_connection()
    execute_query(conn, "INSERT INTO users ...")
    set_cache(f"user:{user.id}", user)
    send_email(user.email, "Welcome!")
    log_event("user_signup", user_id=user.id)
    close_connection(conn)
    return user
